link.description: Practical introductions to the building blocks of modern AI: large language models, agents, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), the tooling ecosystem, and the trade-offs between enterprise cloud platforms and locally hosted models. Includes product-focused topics (cost, structured outputs, privacy, skills, human-in-the-loop) and capstone guides for choosing patterns and debugging production issues. Start with Which Pattern When?, follow cross-links, or skim the glossary.
